summary: Completed comprehensive e2e testing of Experimental Elaichi food blog. Fixed 1 backend bug (GET /api/auth/me returning 500). All 15 backend tests pass. All frontend flows tested successfully including homepage, recipe detail, search/filter, admin login, recipe creation, and logout.

fixed.issue: Returned 500 error due to _id not being converted to id in get_current_user function
fixed.fix: Changed user['_id'] = str(user['_id']) to user['id'] = str(user['_id']) and added user.pop('_id', None)

critical_code_review_comments: ESLint warnings for missing dependencies in useEffect hooks (AuthContext.js, Home.js, RecipeDetail.js) - minor, not blocking
Storage init error is expected as mentioned in context (EMERGENT_LLM_KEY not configured for object storage)
seed_data_creation: 4 seeded recipes exist: Cardamom Fusion Biryani, Masala Chai Panna Cotta, Tandoori Paneer Tacos, Curry Leaf & Coconut Risotto
context_for_next_testing_agent: All features working correctly. Backend API tests in /app/backend/tests/test_api.py cover auth, recipes CRUD, search/filter. Frontend uses cookies for auth (httpOnly). The storage init error in logs is expected and not a bug.
